mapper.update: update ietm_project_configuration_management set has_child = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id as "key", code as "title", (case when has_child = '1' then 0 else 1 end) as isLeaf, pid as parentId from ietm_project_configuration_management where pid = #{pid}
and ${key} = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ietm_dm WHERE cm_node_id = #{cmNodeId} AND status = '1'
